relationship_method.event_from_source: Each transaction event connects to exactly one source node.
relationship_method.event_to_target: Each transaction event connects to exactly one target node.
relationship_method.event_at_location: Each transaction event connects to its location node.
relationship_method.event_has_type: Each transaction event connects to its transaction type node.
relationship_method.reverse_edges: Reverse relations are added so information can flow from entities back to events.
relationship_method.source_to_target: A direct source-target edge is added for every observed transaction pair.
relationship_method.source_to_location: A direct source-location edge is added for every observed source-location interaction.
relationship_method.source_to_type: A direct source-type edge is added for every observed source-type interaction.
relationship_method.target_to_location: A direct target-location edge is added for every observed target-location interaction.
relationship_method.target_to_type: A direct target-type edge is added for every observed target-type interaction.
